message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model trait implementations for Paginator and Stopwatch

- Add Model trait impl for Paginator with init/update/view methods
- Add Model trait impl for Stopwatch for standalone bubbletea usage
- Complete Model trait coverage for all 11 bubbles components:
  cursor, filepicker, help, list, paginator, progress, stopwatch,
  table, textarea, textinput, timer

This completes epic charmed_rust-67j, enabling all bubbles components
to be used as standalone models in bubbletea applications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
